description: Phase 12 seed corpus for health-ai-service RAG. Each article is adapted from public-domain medical sources (WHO, NIH MedlinePlus, CDC, NICE, EFSA, AASM). Each topic is covered in all three locales (en, ru, kk). The kk articles are drafts derived from ru/en sources and flagged for human review. Sensitive topics (sexual health, STIs, HPV/cervical screening, Hep B lifestyle factors, in-pregnancy vaccine schedules) are intentionally excluded per project content policy.
